# uiauto-framework

> Go-based, generic, self-healing UI automation framework with multi-tier
> model routing, OmniParser visual grounding, and natural-language scenarios.
> Scenarios are written in plain English; a SelfHealer orchestrates Light,
> Smart (LLM), and VLM tiers automatically.

## Overview

- Name: uiauto-framework
- Purpose: Self-healing UI automation framework with three execution tiers (Light: cached patterns, Smart: LLM-powered discovery, VLM: visual grounding via OmniParser); includes plugin seams for custom actions, scenario loaders, auth providers, and visual verifiers.
- Language(s): Go
- License: Apache-2.0
- Authoritative README: <https://github.com/nfsarch33/uiauto-framework#readme>
- Source of truth branch: `main`

## Quick Start

- Build:
  ```
  make build
  ```
- Run smoke test:
  ```
  make smoke
  ```
- Install from source:
  ```
  go install github.com/nfsarch33/uiauto-framework/cmd/ui-agent@latest
  ```
- Minimum runtime prerequisites: Go 1.24+, Chrome/Chromium

## Key Concepts

- Architecture: `docs/architecture.md`
- Three execution tiers:
  - Light: fingerprint-cached selector replay (instant)
  - Smart: LLM-powered discovery loop for selector re-resolution
  - VLM: visual scoring via OmniParser-annotated screenshots
- SelfHealer: orchestrates tier escalation (fingerprint -> structural -> LLM -> VLM)
- Plugin seams (`pkg/uiauto/plugin/`): ActionRegistry, ScenarioLoader, AuthProvider, VisualVerifier
- LLM routing: TieredRouter (failover), SemanticRouter (task-aware), MQRouter (fair-share)
- Scenario format: JSON with natural-language steps and `action_types` (click, type, verify, wait, frame, evaluate, read)
- Scenario format docs: `docs/scenario-format.md`
- Plugin guide: `docs/plugin-guide.md`
- Observability: `docs/observability.md`

## Runnable Examples

- Public smoke: `make smoke` (runs `examples/example-com-smoke/scenario.json`)
- Form demo: `make form-smoke` (types into form, waits for result)
- Quality gates: `make lint && make test && make test-integration && make ossready`

## Related Repos

- [ironclaw-mcp](https://github.com/nfsarch33/ironclaw-mcp) — MCP server for autonomous AI runtime
- [llm-cluster-router](https://github.com/nfsarch33/llm-cluster-router) — LLM routing proxy

## Operational Notes

- Issue tracker: <https://github.com/nfsarch33/uiauto-framework/issues>
- Project status: early-access reference implementation; APIs may change before v1.0.0
